description_long: This is a large, modern red pickup truck with a four-door crew cab and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear. The vehicle features prominent chrome accents, including a robust front grille guard and side mirrors, as well as large, rugged tires suitable for urban and off-road environments. The truck's body is primarily red with subtle black and gray detailing, and it has a set of roof marker lights above the windshield. The rear cargo bed is open and appears to have a textured liner for durability and utility. The windows are tinted black, and the truck is equipped with side steps for easier entry. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty, utility-focused vehicle, likely manufactured by Ford, as indicated by the visible badge on the tailgate.
description: A large red four-door pickup truck with chrome accents, rugged tires, and an open cargo bed, designed for utility and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red pickup truck, four doors, chrome side mirrors, and open cargo bed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the chrome grille guard, roof marker lights, and wide stance of the truck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the crew cab, open cargo bed, and rugged wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate with Ford badge, and rear lights.
